item.title: How to generate self-signed certificates
item.author: Author
item.description: When developing, we may need to use certificate. Instead of using Let’s Encrypt or even pay for one, we can use openssl & keytool command line to generate self-signed certificates.

item.title: How to kill inactive ssh sessions
item.author: Author
